seo_title: This Smart Bird Feeder Uses AI to Capture More Backyard Drama
meta_description: The Coolfly Aura Smart Bird Feeder uses AI-powered bird identification and a wider view of birds, but is it worth the investment?
body_html:
The Coolfly Aura Smart Bird Feeder uses AI-powered bird identification and a wider view of birds, allowing users to capture more backyard drama.

A 4MP sensor with up to 2.5K video through a 150-degree wide-angle lens A larger size than most smart bird feeders, requiring a mount on a pole or structure A wider view of birds due to the camera's placement beside the feeder

Design and Build The overall design is attractive, with a slate-blue metal frame.

Performance and Video Quality Up to 2.5K video quality through the 150-degree wide-angle lens

Pricing and Availability The Aura Smart Bird Feeder is available for purchase on Coolfly's website, with a price tag of $299.

source.title: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama
source.summary: A resident of South Carolina's Lowcountry has been observing an abundance of bird species in their backyard. The area is known for its diverse wildlife, with birds such as ospreys, roseate spoonbills, and eagles frequently spotted. This has led to a fascination with the local avifauna, which has become a source of entertainment and enjoyment for the homeowner.
